name: Kog'Maw
title: The Mouth of the Abyss
shortBio: - Caustic Spittle (Q) is point and click

skins.name: Pug'Maw
skins.description: Pug'Maw is a nine month old purebred pug with a sweet disposition and possibly some sort of salivary problem. Great with children and pets. Highly food motivated. Has eaten three action figures and one doll, approach with extreme caution.

skins.name: Bee'Maw

chromas.name: Bee'Maw (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

skins.description: Snowballing lane won't bring back your precious honey!

skins.name: Zap'Maw

chromas.name: Zap'Maw (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

skins.description: The Zap'Maw is a curious monster that baffles even the most experienced of Tamers. Sightings are limited to abandoned ruins that only the bravest dare enter. But taming one is an even more challenging task. Only one Tamer has succeeded so far, their bond—and the Zap'Maw's lightning attacks—growing stronger each day.

descriptions.description: This Chroma was awarded to players who accumulated at least 1000 Split Points and reached Bronze rank in any Summoner's Rift ranked queue in Season 2024 - Split 1

skins.description: Kog'Maw was earned by players who accumulated enough split points in Ranked. Those curious enough to follow the shimmering ooze trailing from the mouth of a crevasse, have but a moment to recognize that same curiosity in Kog'Maw's glittering stare before finding themselves enveloped in his terrible mouth.

passive.name: Icathian Surprise
passive.description: Upon dying, Kog'Maw starts a chain reaction in his body which causes him to detonate after 4 seconds; dealing magic damage to surrounding enemies.

spells.name: Caustic Spittle
spells.description:
Passive: Increases Kog'Maw's Attack Speed.

Active: Kog'Maw launches a corrosive projectile which deals magic damage and corrodes the target's Armor and Magic Resist for 4 seconds.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Passive: Kog'Maw gains @PassiveAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

Active: Kog'Maw vomits a corrosive projectile that deals @TotalDamage@ magic damage to the first enemy hit and shreds @ArmorShred@ Armor and Magic Resist for @DebuffDuration@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Bio-Arcane Barrage
spells.description: Kog'Maw's attacks gain range and deal a percent of the target's maximum health as magic damage.
spells.dynamicDescription: Kog'Maw gains @Range@ Attack Range and his Attacks deal an additional <magicDamage>@TotalHealthDamage@ max Health magic damage</magicDamage> <OnHit>On-Hit</OnHit> for @Duration@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Void Ooze
spells.description: Kog'Maw launches a peculiar ooze which damages all enemies it passes through and leaves a trail which slows enemies who stand on it.
spells.dynamicDescription: Kog'Maw spits bile, dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> and leaves a trail of ooze for @TrailDuration@ seconds. Enemies in the ooze are <status>Slowed</status> by @SlowAmount*100@%.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Living Artillery
spells.description: Kog'Maw fires a living artillery shell at a great distance dealing damage and revealing targets.  Additionally, multiple Living Artilleries in a short period of time cause them to cost additional mana.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Kog'Maw shoots acid from a great distance that lands shortly after launch. Deals @TotalDamage@ magic damage , increased to @ChampionTotalDamage@ magic damage to Champions and reveals enemies for @VisionDebuffDuration@ seconds.

Subsequent artillery shots within @ManaCostDuration@ seconds cost @BaseCost@ additional Mana (max: @ManaCostCap@ Mana).@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
